rows.claim_boundary: Translation/rotation DOF block Schur FGMRES is a physics-aware ROCm sparse preconditioner. It uses sparse subblock matvecs and Jacobi approximate triangular block solves on the ROCm torch device. Optional Schur-basis, node-local 6DOF smoother, and node-aggregate 6DOF coarse corrections improve the preconditioner residual through replay-checked block structure, and can only promote closure when full assembled CSR residual replay meets the G9 gate.
